title: Agent Recommendation
description: Standard output schema for every recommendation produced by any Economic Engineering Agent. All recommendations must conform to this schema.

recommendation.description: Clear, specific, actionable recommendation in one or two sentences

business_impact.description: Expected business impact. At least one impact category must be non-null.

opportunity_score.description: Score from 0-100 using: Profit Impact (30) + Customer Value (20) + Speed (15) + Confidence (15) + Strategic Value (10) - Risk (5) - Complexity (5)

evidence.description: All evidence supporting this recommendation. If empty, confidence must be ≤0.3.

confidence_score.description: 0.0–0.3 = assumption/speculation. 0.4–0.6 = informed estimate. 0.7–0.9 = supported by data. 1.0 = verified and tested.

assumptions.description: Every assumption baked into this recommendation, stated explicitly

missing_data.description: Data that would change or improve this recommendation

risk.description: Primary risk if this recommendation is implemented and fails

experiment_required.description: true for any recommendation that would change the customer experience, pricing, or operations. false only for internal process changes with no customer-facing impact.

next_action.description: The single most important next step to move this recommendation forward
